positive: A minimalist, neo-geometric illustration featuring a stylized, ethereal mountain range at sunrise. The scene is rendered with thick, clean black lines against a vibrant, gradient background transitioning from deep indigo at the bottom to soft golden-pink at the top. Incorporate abstract, overlapping fauna silhouettes—such as stylized soaring birds and leaping deer—integrated seamlessly into the mountain peaks. The composition must be centered, high contrast, and highly scalable for screen printing or direct-to-garment apparel. Style: bold linework, modern graphic novel aesthetic, flat design principles. Lighting: directional sunrise glow, emphasizing clean edges and strong negative space. Color Palette: Indigo, Gold, Dusty Pink, and stark Black.
negative: blur, low detail, artifact, text, signature, watermark, grain, noise, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy lines, realistic photography, grayscale, overly detailed, cluttered
